2.title: ConcurrentCalls (by MetricGroup)
2.query:
timeseries concurrent_calls_by_metric_group = avg(cloud.aws.connect.concurrent_calls_by_metric_group),
  by: { MetricGroup }
| sort arrayAvg(concurrent_calls_by_metric_group) desc
| limit 20

3.title: ConcurrentCallsPercentage (by MetricGroup)
3.query:
timeseries concurrent_calls_percentage_by_metric_group = avg(cloud.aws.connect.concurrent_calls_percentage_by_metric_group),
  by: { MetricGroup }
| sort arrayAvg(concurrent_calls_percentage_by_metric_group) desc
| limit 20

6.title: LongestQueueWaitTime (by MetricGroup and QueueName)
6.query:
timeseries longest_queue_wait_time_by_metric_group_queue_name = max(cloud.aws.connect.longest_queue_wait_time_by_metric_group_queue_name),
  by: { QueueName }
| sort arrayMax(longest_queue_wait_time_by_metric_group_queue_name) desc
| limit 20
